items.question: How quickly do you ship orders?
items.answer: Orders are typically fulfilled within 24 hours of payment confirmation and shipped via USPS. Orders placed on weekends or holidays will be processed on the next business day.

items.question: What should I do if my package hasn’t moved?
items.answer:
If your tracking hasn’t updated in 2 business days:
1. Check the tracking number via USPS Tracking.
2. Email us at info@example.com with your order number and tracking information.
3. You may also call USPS to file a claim if necessary.

We will review your case and reship your package if USPS shows no movement within 2 business days.

items.question: Do you ship internationally?
items.answer:
Yes—some countries are available now. If you don’t see your country at checkout, please email us with your full mailing information, including:
• Name
• Address
• Phone number
• Email address

We will check the cost and add your country to the website if possible.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer:
We accept:
• Credit/Debit Cards
• Example Wallet: @YourHandle

Please note: Due to the nature of our industry, processors may change.
